basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Junior Industrial Inspector Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.department: Office of the Industries Commissioner (under Industries and Mines Department)
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Single-stage CBRT/OMR objective (MCQ) written exam, followed by document verification
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Gauna Seva Pasandgi Mandal (GSSSB), Gandhinagar has released Advertisement No. 442/202627 to fill 3 vacancies for the post of Junior Industry Inspector, Class-3 (Junior Udyog Nirikshak, Varg-3) under the office of the Industries Commissioner, Industries and Mines Department, Government of Gujarat. This recruitment is being conducted exclusively under the Special Recruitment Drive for Divyang (Persons with Disabilities) candidates to fill the backlog of PwD reserved vacancies. Eligible candidates can apply online through ojas.gujarat.gov.in from 20 July 2026 to 3 August 2026.

important_dates.exam_date: Not yet announced. GSSSB will publish the exam date and call letter/admit card download schedule separately on gsssb.gujarat.gov.in

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid online only - via Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallets - after generating the confirmation number. Applicable transaction charges apply in addition to the exam fee. Fee must be paid by 6 August 2026, 11:59 PM. The fee is refunded only to candidates who actually appear for the exam. Candidates who do not appear will not get a refund. The fee once paid is non-refundable if the application itself is rejected by GSSSB.

age_limit.details: The standard age limit is 18 to 35 years. Upper age relaxation is available for Divyang candidates as follows: | Category Relaxation Maximum Age Limit General category Divyang (Male) 10 years 45 years General category Divyang (Female) 15 years (10+5) 45 years Reserved category Divyang (Male) 15 years (5+10) 45 years Reserved category Divyang (Female) 20 years (5+10+5) 45 years | Candidates already in Gujarat Government service may also get upper age relaxation as per the 1967 Recruitment Rules. Age relaxation for Divyang candidates is subject to a medical certificate from the Superintendent/Civil Surgeon as prescribed under the Health and Family Welfare Department circular dated 15 December 2025.

vacancy_details.Type of Disability Covered: Locomotor disability including cerebral palsy, leprosy cured, dwarfism, acid attack victims, muscular weakness, one arm/one leg/both arms/both legs affected, spinal deformity/injury (OA, OL, BA, BL, LC, Dw, AAV, SD, SI)
Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD), Intellectual Disability, Specific Learning Disability (SLD), Mental Illness (MI), and Multiple Disabilities (MD), including deaf-blindness

pwd_wise_breakdown.type_of_disability_covered: Locomotor disability including cerebral palsy, leprosy cured, dwarfism, acid attack victims, muscular weakness, one arm/one leg/both arms/both legs affected, spinal deformity/injury (OA, OL, BA, BL, LC, Dw, AAV, SD, SI)
Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD), Intellectual Disability, Specific Learning Disability (SLD), Mental Illness (MI), and Multiple Disabilities (MD), including deaf-blindness

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be appointed on a fixed pay of ₹40,800 per month for the first five years, as per the Finance Department resolutions (last revised 18 October 2023). After five years of satisfactory service, the candidate becomes eligible for regular appointment in the 7th Pay Commission pay scale of ₹29,200 – ₹92,300 (Level-5), subject to the outcome of Supreme Court cases SLP No. 14124/2012 and SLP No. 14125/2012.

how_to_apply: Find Advertisement No. 442/202627 (Junior Industry Inspector, Class-3), click on the cadre name, then click "Apply".
Read the "More Details" option carefully before proceeding, then click "Apply Now".

Click "Skip" to open the Application Format and fill in the Personal Details section (fields marked with a red asterisk * are mandatory). Note: completing One Time Registration (OTR) alone does not count as applying for this advertisement.
Fill in the Educational Details section.
Read the "Assurance" (declaration) section, select "Yes", and click "Save" to complete the application.
Note down the Application Number generated after saving.

Go to "Upload Photograph", enter your Application Number and Date of Birth, then upload your photograph (5 cm height x 3.6 cm width) and signature (2.5 cm height x 7.5 cm width) - both in JPG format, size not exceeding 15 KB each.

Go to "Confirm Application" under the Online Application tab, enter your Application Number and Date of Birth, review all details carefully, and edit if needed. Once confirmed, no changes can be made. Click "Confirm Application" to generate your Confirmation Number - save this for future reference.

Go to "Print Application", select the job, enter your Confirmation Number and Date of Birth to view and print your application. Keep a printed copy safely until the entire recruitment process is completed.
Pay the application fee online (Debit Card/Internet Banking/UPI/Wallet) before 6 August 2026, and save the fee payment receipt.

content_sections.heading: Quick Overview - GSSSB Junior Industrial Inspector Recruitment 2026

rows.details: Gujarat Gauna Seva Pasandgi Mandal (GSSSB), Gandhinagar
Office of the Industries Commissioner (under Industries and Mines Department)
Single-stage CBRT/OMR objective (MCQ) written exam, followed by document verification

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for GSSSB Junior Industrial Inspector Recruitment

rows.event: Last Date to Pay Exam Fee

rows.date: Not yet announced. GSSSB will publish the exam date and call letter/admit card download schedule separately on gsssb.gujarat.gov.in

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Junior Industrial Inspector Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: Only candidates belonging to the specific disability group shown against a vacancy are eligible to apply for that group. No separate horizontal reservation is kept for women or ex-servicemen in this drive, as it is specifically meant to fill the PwD reservation backlog. Selected candidates will be adjusted against their respective category (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS) vacancies where applicable.

rows.type_of_disability_covered: Locomotor disability including cerebral palsy, leprosy cured, dwarfism, acid attack victims, muscular weakness, one arm/one leg/both arms/both legs affected, spinal deformity/injury (OA, OL, BA, BL, LC, Dw, AAV, SD, SI)
Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD), Intellectual Disability, Specific Learning Disability (SLD), Mental Illness (MI), and Multiple Disabilities (MD), including deaf-blindness

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only Divyang (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities) candidates belonging to the disability groups listed in the vacancy table above are eligible to apply. This is not a general recruitment. The candidate must be a citizen of India, or must hold the nationality prescribed under Rule 7 of the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. The standard age limit is 18 to 35 years. Upper age relaxation is available for Divyang candidates as follows: Candidates already in Gujarat Government service may also get upper age relaxation as per the 1967 Recruitment Rules. Age relaxation for Divyang candidates is subject to a medical certificate from the Superintendent/Civil Surgeon as prescribed under the Health and Family Welfare Department circular dated 15 December 2025. Candidates must possess one of the following: A Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (excluding Civil Engineering) from a university established/incorporated under a Central or State Act in India, or an institution recognized as a deemed university under the UGC Act, 1956; OR A Diploma in Engineering or Technology (excluding Civil Engineering) from the Technical Examination Board or a Government-recognized institution, along with about 2 years of practical experience as a technical worker (not as labour) in Government service, a Government undertaking, or an industry/company incorporated under the Companies Act, 2013. In addition, candidates must have: Basic knowledge of computer applications as prescribed under the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 (candidates without this certificate at the time of application may still apply, but must submit it before appointment). Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi, or both. The final eligibility at the time of selection will be governed by the complete recruitment rules for this cadre, not just the summary given in the application form.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Junior Industrial Inspector Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be appointed on a fixed pay of ₹40,800 per month for the first five years, as per the Finance Department resolutions (last revised 18 October 2023). After five years of satisfactory service, the candidate becomes eligible for regular appointment in the 7th Pay Commission pay scale of ₹29,200 – ₹92,300 (Level-5), subject to the outcome of Supreme Court cases SLP No. 14124/2012 and SLP No. 14125/2012.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee must be paid online only - via Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallets - after generating the confirmation number. Applicable transaction charges apply in addition to the exam fee. Fee must be paid by 6 August 2026, 11:59 PM. The fee is refunded only to candidates who actually appear for the exam. Candidates who do not appear will not get a refund. The fee once paid is non-refundable if the application itself is rejected by GSSSB.

rows.category: Reserved category (all-category women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, Divyang, and Ex-servicemen)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made through a single-stage Computer Based Response Test (CBRT) / OMR-based objective (MCQ) written examination, followed by document verification. Combined duration for Part A and Part B: 3 hours (180 minutes). Negative marking: 1/4th of the marks allotted to a question is deducted for every wrong answer. Qualifying standard: Candidates must score at least 40% in Part A AND at least 40% in Part B separately (independent qualifying standards); this minimum cannot be relaxed for any category. After the provisional result, roughly 2 times the number of vacancies (category/disability-group wise) will be called for document verification. The final selection list and waiting list will be prepared disability-group wise (A, B, C, D & E) based on merit. Questions in Part A on the Constitution of India and Current Affairs, and all Part B technical questions, will be set in both Gujarati and English. Gujarati comprehension questions will be in Gujarati only, and English comprehension questions will be in English only.

rows.subject: Technical subject related to the educational qualification

rows.topic: Basic Computer Engineering (including MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Internet/Email basics)
Industries Policy (Atmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme 2022, Gujarat Textile Policy 2024, MSMED Act 2006, Purchase Policy 2024, Startup Policy of Gujarat, EODB)

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must keep the original copies of the following certificates ready, as they will need to be produced during document verification (details of exact certificate formats are given in the notification): Educational qualification certificates (degree/diploma mark sheets and certificates) Date of birth / school leaving certificate Disability (Divyangta) Certificate in Form V, VI, or VII as prescribed under The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Rules, 2017 Category certificate (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS), where applicable, from a competent authority in the Gujarat Government's prescribed format Non-Creamy Layer certificate for SEBC candidates (valid, obtained between 1 April 2024 and 3 August 2026) or the equivalent Annexure-A certificate for Central Government reservation EWS (Economically Weaker Section) certificate in the prescribed Annexure-KH / Parishisht-Ga format, obtained between 4 August 2023 and 3 August 2026, or an Income and Asset Certificate for FY 2025-26 Basic computer knowledge certificate/diploma/degree/mark sheet (or Standard 10/12 mark sheet showing Computer as a subject) Sports certificate, if claiming benefit of extra marks for representing at national/international, inter-university, or All India School level competitions Widow status proof, if claiming benefit as a widow candidate Passport-size photograph (white background, taken within 1 year of the last date of application) and signature in the prescribed format for upload

content_sections.heading: Scribe (Lekhak) / Compensatory Time Facility for Divyang Candidates
content_sections.text: As per the Government of India Office Memorandum dated 29 August 2018, eligible Benchmark Disability candidates who are unable to write or have difficulty writing can avail scribe/compensatory time facility, subject to conditions: Compensatory time of 20 minutes per hour is admissible to eligible benchmark disability candidates with limited writing ability. Candidates with Blindness or Locomotor Disability (Both Arms affected) need only submit their disability certificate; a separate medical certificate of inability to write is not required. Candidates with other benchmark disabilities must additionally submit Appendix-I - a certificate of physical limitation to write, issued by the Chief Medical Officer/Civil Surgeon/Medical Superintendent. The application for this facility, along with required documents, must be emailed to [email protected] at least 2 days before the exam, after the call letter download instructions are published. Applications received after this will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click Here Apply Online: https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in GSSSB Official Website: https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in

faq.question: Q1. What is GSSSB Junior Industrial Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a Special Recruitment Drive by the Gujarat Gauna Seva Pasandgi Mandal to fill 3 backlog vacancies of Junior Industry Inspector, Class-3, reserved exclusively for Divyang (PwD) candidates, under Advertisement No. 442/202627.

faq.question: Q2. Who is eligible to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Only Divyang candidates belonging to disability Group B (Deaf/Hard of Hearing), Group C (locomotor disabilities), or Group D & E (autism, intellectual disability, SLD, mental illness, multiple disabilities) are eligible, since these are the only groups with vacancies in this drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply online?
faq.answer: The online application window is open from 20 July 2026 (5:00 PM) to 3 August 2026 (11:59 PM). The exam fee must be paid by 6 August 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q4. How many total vacancies are there?
faq.answer: There are 3 total vacancies: 1 for Group B, 1 for Group C, and 1 for Group D & E disability categories. There are no vacancies in Group A (Blindness/Low Vision) in this advertisement.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for GSSSB Junior Industrial Inspector 2026?
faq.answer: The base age limit is 18 to 35 years as on 3 August 2026, with age relaxation of 10 to 20 years for Divyang candidates depending on gender and category, subject to a maximum age of 45 years.
